page_content:
DATA110 Applications of R for Data Science (1 Credit) Intended to prepare students for subsequent courses requiring computation with R, providing powerful and easy to use tools for statistical data analysis. Covers basics of R and R Studio including ﬁle handling, data simulation, graphical displays, vector and function operations, probability distributions, and inferential techniques for data analysis. Prerequisite: DATA100, STAT100, or MATH135; or any 400-level STAT course. Cross-listed with: STAT110. Credit Only Granted for: STAT110 or DATA110.

DATA120 Python Programming for Data Science (1 Credit) An introduction to programming in Python language, using Jupyter Notebooks and Python scripts. Covers variables, conditionals, loops, functions, lists, strings, tuples, sets, dictionaries, ﬁles and visualization. Prerequisite: STAT100, MATH135, or any 400-level STAT course.
